Our Products

Technology Made for Africa

Purpose-built digital products that solve real problems for African entrepreneurs and businesses.

🇬🇭 Flagship Product

Akwaaba AI

AI-Powered Business Communication for Africa

Akwaaba — the Akan word for “welcome” — is at the heart of our AI platform. Akwaaba AI helps African businesses welcome and serve their customers through intelligent, multilingual communication that understands local context, languages, and business practices.

🗣️

Local Languages

Twi, Ga, Ewe, Hausa, Pidgin and more

💰

Mobile Money

Accept payments via MoMo, Vodafone Cash

📱

WhatsApp Ready

Automate customer conversations

📊

Smart Analytics

Track customer insights in real-time

🔒

Secure & Private

Data protection compliant

💡

Easy Setup

Get started in under 30 minutes

Visit akwaabaai.comRequest a Demo
Akwaaba AI Plans

Affordable for Every Business

Pricing designed for African businesses — start small and scale as you grow.

Starter

GHS 99/month

Perfect for small businesses just getting started with AI

  • 500 AI conversations/month
  • 1 WhatsApp number
  • Basic analytics
  • English + 1 local language
  • Email support
Start Free Trial
Most Popular

Growth

GHS 299/month

For growing businesses that need more power and features

  • 5,000 AI conversations/month
  • 3 WhatsApp numbers
  • Advanced analytics dashboard
  • All local languages
  • Mobile money integration
  • Priority support
  • Custom AI training
Start Free Trial

Enterprise

Custom

For large businesses with complex requirements

  • Unlimited conversations
  • Unlimited channels
  • White-label solution
  • Dedicated account manager
  • Custom integrations
  • SLA guarantee
  • On-site training
Contact Sales
Custom Solutions

Tailored for Your Business

Beyond Akwaaba AI, we build custom digital products that solve your specific business challenges.

🏪

Marketplace Platforms

Custom marketplace solutions connecting buyers and sellers across West Africa, with integrated mobile money payments.

🚚

Logistics & Delivery

Real-time tracking and delivery management platforms built for the African logistics landscape.

🏦

Agent Banking Systems

Digital platforms for agent banking networks, enabling financial services in underserved communities.

📋

Business Management Tools

ERP, CRM, and inventory management systems designed for the way African businesses operate.

🎓

EdTech Platforms

Online learning and training platforms optimized for low-bandwidth environments.

🏥

HealthTech Solutions

Digital health platforms connecting patients with healthcare providers across the region.

Have a Product Idea?

We love turning ideas into reality. Share your vision and we will help you build it.
